name: Frozen Fruit Fantasy (Ovo Lacto)
recipeIngredient: 1 t Lemon rind or orange rind
recipeInstructions:
1. Vary the fruit juice and fruit puree combinations to develop your own creative desserts according to the seasons.
2. It takes almost two cups of fruit to make one cup of puree. Bananas can be mashed with a fork; other fruits do better in a blender.
3. Soften gelatin in cold water for 2-3 minutes.
4. Combine gelatin, lemon juice, fruit puree, grated rind or seasoning, fruit juice concentrate, and yogurt in a bowl. Mix thoroughly.
5. Freeze until crystals begin to form around the edges.
6. Beat egg whites until stiff.
7. Remove the yogurt mixture from the freezer and stir with a spoon until smooth.
8. Fold in beaten egg whites.
9. Return the mixture to the freezer and freeze until firm.
10. About 30 minutes before serving, remove from the freezer and let it soften slightly.
11. Scoop into stemmed dessert dishes for a festive presentation.
Note: If desired, use 1/2 teaspoon ground ginger, cinnamon, or cardamom in place of lemon or orange rind. Honey may be used in place of the juice concentrate.
